creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-01-31 11:36:39 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    misc                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    misc/typetrainer     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This small utility allows you to grow your typing skills in soft and non-
  annoying manner. It tries to behave closely to proprietary VerseQ application
  -- adaptive typing tutor which dynamically changes exercises to help trainee to
  learn hard places thoroughly.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/baverman/typetrainer
  
  PR:             ports/154373
  Submitted by:   Ruslan Mahmatkhanov <cvs-src at yandex.ru>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.970     +1 -0      ports/misc/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/misc/typetrainer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/misc/typetrainer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/misc/typetrainer/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +54 -0     ports/misc/typetrainer/pkg-plist (new)
